THE TOTAL AMOUNT DUE IS $1,300.00. NOTHING IN THE DECLARATION RELATES TO THE FAILURE TO APPEAR IN COURT. NEVERTHELESS, THE COURT WILL REDUCE THE SANCTIONS DUE TO $700.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARINGS. THIS AMOUNT MUST BE PAID TO THE SAN FRANCISCO SUPERIOR COURT ON OR BEFORE AUG-22-2016, IN ROOM 103 AT 400 MCALLISTER STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94102. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-18-2018 Off Calendar

Notice Of Hearing Re: Application For Default Judgment
Off Calendar Nov-27-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Senoris Jinks.
Dept. 514. Judge: Eric R. Fleming. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703.

Alden Knisbacher, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Keva Knox, who was not present for this morning's proceedings.
No appearance by defendant Senoris Jinks.
Plaintiff's second amended complaint for negligence was filed on January 23, 2018 and personally served on defendant Senoris Jinks on February 14, 2018.
Default was entered against defendant on July 13, 2018.
Order waiving plaintiff's appearance as today's default prove-up hearing was filed on November 26, 2018.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Keva Knox, and against the Defaulted Defendant Senoris Jinks, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $7,180.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $1,197.84.
Costs - $370.00.

Total - $8,747.84.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
